Weather Station Coverage across Spain

Choropleth map showing the distance from each Spanish municipality to the nearest AEMET weather station. Areas in deep blue are more than 15 km away from the closest station, revealing coverage gaps across the interior plateau and mountain ranges.

Tools Python · GeoPandas · Matplotlib
Context #30DayMapChallenge 2025 · Day: Points
Data AEMET OpenData · Administrative boundaries CNIG-IGN
